name: The Commission
description: The governing body of the American Mafia, formed in 1931 by Charles 'Lucky' Luciano after the Castellammarese War. It consists of the bosses of the Five Families of New York City, the Chicago Outfit, and occasionally other families. The Commission oversees Mafia activities in the United States and mediates conflicts between families.

sources.title: U.S. Jury Convicts Eight As Members of Mob Commission
